completed: Fix duplicate password hashing in faculty credential regeneration
Add Employee ID support to login controller
Verify password hashing logic via diagnostic scripts
pending: Cleanup scratch files (optional, left for user audit)

decisions.context: Faculty unable to login after credential resend
decisions.decision: Remove manual bcrypt.hash in controller; rely on Faculty model's pre-save hook
decisions.trade_offs: Ensures no double-hashing, maintains consistency with import flow

decisions.context: User confusion over 'Institutional Email' vs 'Employee ID'
decisions.decision: Allow login with either email or employeeId in the email field
decisions.trade_offs: Increases login flexibility and reduces support requests
